hero.title: Real Estate Advisory Built for Modern India

hero.securityText: Assisting family offices, buyers, and enterprises with total confidentiality

about.title: Simplifying real estate complexity through technology and institutional research.
about.subtitle: FollowProperty is an independent prop-tech intelligence and real estate advisory firm. We build tracking infrastructure, research indexes, and consultative desks to help families, buyers, and developers navigate transactions with trust and clarity.

pillars.title: Institutional Research
pillars.desc: We audit municipal RERA filings, property circular rates, and developer records to deliver simplified, objective compliance intelligence.

pillars.title: Consultative Advisory
pillars.desc: Our advisory team provides tailormade guidance for buyers, family offices, and developers throughout their real estate journey.

pillars.title: Transaction Compliance
pillars.desc: We verify title records, ownership history, and municipal approvals to ensure transaction safety and mitigate transaction risk.

about.quote: “Real estate transactions are highly complex and carry deep lifetime significance. We build tools and advisory systems to make this journey transparent, logical, and safe for everyone.”

services.title: Are you looking to buy an apartment?
services.subtitle: We provide strategic buyer guidance, developer channel partnerships, municipal record review, and custom consulting to secure your acquisitions.

items.title: Portfolio Guidance
items.desc: Discover premium residential, commercial, and plotting options backed by thorough circle rate analysis and pricing benchmarks.

items.title: Channel Partnerships
items.desc: Collaborating with trusted builders (like BPTP for Downtown 66) to offer verified, high-yield commercial and residential inventory.

items.title: Buyer Assistance & Due Diligence
items.desc: Navigate deed registrations, title search checkups, and municipal RERA filings with dedicated compliance support.

items.title: Builder & Developer Alliances
items.desc: Assisting land developers and channel partners with regulatory compliance tracking and market pricing feeds.

products.title: Prop-Tech Infrastructure & Tools
products.subtitle: FollowProperty.com is our proprietary property intelligence platform. We deploy specialized research tools to assist buyers, developers, and enterprises.

items.title: FollowProperty Intelligence Platform
items.desc: A secure analytical system for monitoring localized circle rates, builder construction milestones, and title deed updates in near real-time.

business.title: Developer Alliances & Channel Partnerships
business.subtitle: Access our verified property database, RERA compliance feeds, and marketing advisory desks to scale your project reach and institutional operations.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the FollowProperty real estate advisory network.

items.question: What is the FollowProperty ecosystem?
items.answer: FollowProperty is an independent prop-tech intelligence and advisory firm. We combine proprietary data software, independent municipal research, and veteran advisory support to clarify and secure real estate transactions.

items.question: Who does FollowProperty serve?
items.answer: We serve individual property buyers, developers, family offices, and channel partners seeking unbiased data, construction tracking, and transaction safety checks.

items.question: Is FollowProperty a brokerage or agency?
items.answer: We act as a prop-tech advisory and strategic channel partner. We collaborate with trusted developers (such as BPTP) to offer verified listings, while maintaining independent due diligence and analytics for our clients.

team.title: Dedicated to Clarity
team.subtitle: A team of researchers, software engineers, and domain analysts building high-trust real estate infrastructure for India.

leadForm.title: Consult with Our Advisory Desk
leadForm.subtitle: Register your property requirements or developer alliance requests below. A partner from our Gurgaon desk will contact you.
leadForm.privacyText: Your inquiries are protected under institutional privacy ledgers.
leadForm.successSubtitle: Thank you for registering. An advisory partner will contact you shortly to review your requirements.
